gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/149)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/149)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الْمَنُّ يَهْدِمُ الصَّنِيعَةَ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, raising it, said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The reproach (embarrassing the recipient) demolishes the favour’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah in a marfu‘ manner the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Embarrassing a recipient, after giving charity destroys the virtue of this benevolent deed.’”
